name: Crunch Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 Cups POST Banana Nut Crunch Cereal or POST Cranberry Almond Crunch Cereal slightly crushed
1 Container (8 oz.) Breyers Vanilla Lowfat Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cereal, cinnamon, and melted butter in a small bowl; set aside.
3. In another small bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Beat butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until softened.
5. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Stir in yogurt and vanilla.
8. Mix flour mixture into the batter on low speed just until smooth.
9. Spread half of the batter in a greased 12-cup fluted tube pan or 9-inch square pan.
10. Top with half of the cereal mixture.
11. Repeat layers, pressing topping in slightly.
12. Bake for 40 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Serve warm. Makes 12 servings.
